sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), tag VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, content, tag) VALUES (1, 'hello World', 'greeting'), (2, 'Hello world', 'greeting'), (3, 'HELLO universe', 'greeting');
SELECT id, content, strcasestr(content, 'hello') AS found_index FROM test_strings WHERE strcasestr(content, 'hello') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE content ILIKE '%hello%';
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_strings t2 WHERE t2.id <> test_strings.id AND strcasestr(t2.content, 'Hello') IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY tag HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND strcasestr(MAX(content), 'world') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, content, strcasestr(NULLIF(content, ''), 'world') AS found_index FROM test_strings WHERE content IS NOT NULL AND strcasestr(content, '') IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_strings AS SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE content ILIKE '%WORLD%';
SELECT t1.id, t1.content FROM test_strings t1 JOIN temp_strings t2 ON strcasestr(t1.content, 'Hello') = strcasestr(t2.content, 'WORLD') WHERE t1.id <> t2.id;
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(content) < 5 AND strcasestr(content, 'nope') IS NULL;
